summary: Dashboard loading state displays correctly with proper mobile layout, email verification prompt, and estimated bill widget. However, the interface uses generic gray/neutral palette instead of the required diner brand palette with teal backgrounds and cream surfaces.

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral gray/white UI surfaces instead of required diner palette - should use teal #9fd8d2 for primary canvas or cream #fff8ea surfaces, not generic gray defaults

actions: Replace neutral gray/white dashboard surfaces with diner palette colors (teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea)
Ensure authenticated UI surfaces maintain brand consistency with public marketing surfaces
Verify email verification CTA button uses diner pink treatment #ffb3c7 instead of current generic styling
